welcome: 👑 Welcome to {bot_name} Game{admin_badge} ⭐ {bot_name} Game is the best online mini-games on Telegram 📢 How to start winning? 1. Make sure you have a balance. You can top up using the "Deposit" button. 2. Join one of our groups from the {bot_name} catalog. 3. Type /play and start playing! 💵 Balance: ${balance_usd:.2f} 👑 Game turnover: ${turnover:.2f} 🌐 About us Channel | Chat | Support
language_changed_en: ✅ Language changed to English!\n\nThe bot is now using English language.
admin_only: ❌ You don't have permission to use this command.
please_use_private: Please use this command with bot in private messages.
admin_commands: 👑 Admin Commands: /addadmin - Add new admin /removeadmin - Remove admin /listadmins - View all admins /demo - Test games without betting /video - Set withdraw video /video status - Check video status /video remove - Remove video /broadcast or /bc - Send a message to all users
available_commands: 📋 Available Commands Basic Commands: • /start - Start the bot • /help - Show help information • /cancel - Cancel current operation Balance & Money: • /balance or /bal - Check your balance • /deposit or /depo - Deposit stars • /withdraw - Withdraw stars to TON wallet Games: • /play - Start playing games Profile & Stats: • /profile - View your profile • /levels - View your level and progress • /history - View your game history • /leaderboard - View top players Rewards: • /weekly - Claim weekly bonus (Saturdays only) • /referral or /ref - View referral information Social: • /tip [amount] - Send stars to another user Support: • /support - Get help or create a support ticket 💡 Tip: Use /help for more information about any command.
private_command_only: 🔒 Private Command Only For your security, the /withdraw command can only be used in a private chat with the bot. 👉 Click here to open DM Or search for @{bot_username} and start a private conversation.
